examples: The addition of photosensitizer could improve the efficiency of photoinitiation.
According to the experimental results, the effect of every photosensitizer was different.
It showed that hypocrellin might be an effective photosensitizer in photodynamic reaction.
Although several light and laser therapies have FDA approval as medical devices to treat acne, no true photodynamic acne therapy, combining photosensitizer and light, has been approved.
